response.overview: When Antoine (20) gets invited by friends for a week at the ocean, the stakes are high. He knows he earned his ticket thanks to his car, but it's now or never to shine and join the pantheon of cool people. The only problem is that Antoine — at the ocean or anywhere else — is anything but cool. On the beach, Antoine seizes an opportunity to pass himself off as a talented surfer. And it works… Suddenly he's thrust into a role whose full consequences he hasn't begun to grasp.
response.title: Prends la vague
